title: Fov +200
description: Expand your field of view up to 200 with automatic saving of your last FOV setting. Lightweight and simple.
body:
**FOVPlus200**

**FOVPlus200 is a lightweight Minecraft mod that increases the maximum Field of View (FOV) up to 200, giving players a much wider perspective and a more dynamic gameplay experience.**

**Perfect for players who enjoy fast-paced gameplay, PvP, or simply want a broader view of their surroundings.**

**✨ Features**
Increase maximum FOV up to 200
Automatically saves your last FOV setting
Lightweight and performance-friendly
Simple and clean — no unnecessary features
**📦 Supported Versions**

Supports multiple Minecraft versions from:
1.20 → 1.21.11

(Each version has its own file for best compatibility)

**⚙️ Installation**
Install Fabric Loader
Download the correct version of the mod
Place the .jar file inside your mods folder
Launch the game and enjoy!
**💡 Notes**
This mod only modifies the FOV limit
No impact on gameplay mechanics
Fully client-side
**📞 Support**

_If you encounter any issues, feel free to contact me on **Discord:
@2g78**_

By Talalphnx
